name: opentag-edge
description: OpenTag edge: Claude Tag bot spine on Cloudflare (StateStore + config + knowledge) with research as a task Worker.

scripts.deploy:research: npm run build:wasm && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.research.toml
scripts.build:wasm: cd wasm-core && tinygo build -o ../workers/wasm-dispatch/src/main.wasm -target wasm -no-debug . && wasm-opt -O3 ../workers/wasm-dispatch/src/main.wasm -o ../workers/wasm-dispatch/src/main.opt.wasm
scripts.test:all: vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.workers.bot-store.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts
scripts.migrate:dry: echo 'Migration is an external action — pass explicit adapters via scripts/migrate-pg-to-do.ts after sign-off'
